ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Continued To Apr-06-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bobby Lydon-Lam appeared by zoom for Connie Yi (Administrator).

The Court stated that this is on for filing of the inventory and appraisal, and for filing of a petition for final distribution, that it doesn't understand why this hasn't been done and noted that letters were issued on August 13, 2019 and that there is no inventory and appraisal. Mr. Lydon-Lam stated that he is substituting in and that it just got over looked. The Court stated that Mr. Lydon-Lam's response does not cut it and noted that Ms. Yi is an Attorney. Mr. Lydon-Lam stated that they had some staffing changes, that they lost a Paralegal, that there is an ancillary proceeding in Oregon and that there is a landlord tenant there. Mr. Lydon-Lam also stated that they plan on getting the inventory and appraisal to the Probate Referee this week, that he expects to get it filed within 60-days, and that the assets are mainly real property in California and in Oregon. Status on close of estate is continued to April 6, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the documents are not filed by then, Ms. Yi must make a personal appearance to explain why they have not been filed.
Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
